kw.name: New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\iTservice\\OneDrive\\\u0e40\u0e2d\u0e01\u0e2a\u0e32\u0e23\\pratice_Automate\\output\\browser\\traces\\temp\\91fb727d-4dc3-4caa-a8f4-e8f5baf7c672"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\iTservice\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Lib\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:38208

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\iTservice\\OneDrive\\เอกสาร\\pratice_Automate\\output\\browser\\traces\\temp\\91fb727d-4dc3-4caa-a8f4-e8f5baf7c672"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/app/register
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

test.name: TC01 - Verify All Register Exceptions

kw.name: Verify All Register Exceptions From CSV
Read Csv File To List
kw.doc: Read CSV file and return its content as a Python list of tuples.
kw.msg: ${data} = [['name', 'email', 'password', 'confirm', 'expected'], ['', 'user@test.com', 'Pass1234!', 'Pass1234!', 'User name is required'], ['John Doe', 'invalid-email', 'Pass1234!', 'Pass1234!', 'Email address ...

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL https://practice.expandtesting.com/notes/app/register

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'user@test.com' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Pass1234!' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Pass1234!' in the given field.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[type="submit"]'.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg:
Text: 'PMP Practice | Free PMP Certification Mock Exam Test +900 Questions & Quizzes Software testing courses
